cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Use a thermal expansion coefficient matching adhesive or insert.

risk.desc: Risk of harness strain relief failure due to sharp edges or unsupported cable exits.
risk.mit: Add strain relief geometry (clamps, grommets) at all cable exits and ensure proper bend radius.

risk.desc: Service hatch may be difficult to access during flight due to wing position.
risk.mit: Design hatch access to be accessible from ground level or include a remote access feature.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are visibly labeled and keying features are present.

risk.desc: Potential for structural failure if service access holes are not properly reinforced.
risk.mit: Add reinforcing ribs or plates around service access holes.
